description_long: This house features a sprawling, multi-section layout with a prominent central structure and two attached wings, all unified by low-pitched, hipped roofs. The main building is elevated on a series of columns, creating a shaded porch or veranda that runs along the front facade. Large, arched openings are visible on the ground level, likely serving as entryways or carports, while the upper level is defined by broad rooflines and minimal exterior ornamentation. The left wing is slightly set back and appears to be a smaller, secondary structure, possibly a garage or guest suite, connected by a covered walkway. The exterior is uniformly finished in a light, neutral color, giving the house a clean and modern appearance. Windows are arranged in a regular, symmetrical pattern, and the overall design emphasizes horizontal lines and open, airy spaces.
description: A large, modern house with hipped roofs, arched ground-level openings, and a symmetrical, multi-section layout. The exterior is light-colored and features a prominent front porch supported by columns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry with columns, central hipped roof, and attached left wing.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the arched openings, the connection between the main house and the left wing, and the extended rooflines.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the house, symmetrical roof structure, and the covered walkway to the left wing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the secondary structure, arched openings, and the overall depth of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with columns, wide steps, and arched openings.
